pages.title: Ingredient Quality
pages.text: An incubator's mature output takes quality from seed $(bold)Potency$():$(br2)$(li)Plant Fiber â†’ Potency$(br)$(li)Industrial Ethanol â†’ Purity$(br)$(li)Biochemical Solution â†’ Concentration$(br2)Missing quality data defaults to 5. Ethanol Purity is a material quality and is not the seed's Synergy gene.

pages.title: Activity Formula
pages.text: $(bold)Base Activity$()$(br)round(PotencyĂ—0.25 + PurityĂ—0.375 + ConcentrationĂ—0.375)$(br2)Take the highest Synergy among all three ingredients and add floor(SynergyĂ·2), then clamp the result to 1â€“15. Serum made from a berry directly inherits the berry's Activity.

pages.title: Effect Scaling
pages.text: $(li)Duration multiplier = 0.5 + ActivityĂ—0.1.$(br)$(li)Activity 1â€“15 gives 0.6â€“2.0x duration.$(br)$(li)Activity 8+ starts the first dose at level II.$(br)$(li)Above Activity 10, every 2 extra points add another starting level.$(br)$(li)All levels remain capped at VIII.
